violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Three damp cloths were stored on the counter by the mixer and oven. The bucket sanitizer did not testtest for a proper concentration of sanitizer. Wiping cloths must be stored in sanitizer, at proper concentration, when not in use.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Boxes of multi fold towels and guest towels were stored on the floor, and under drain lines, in the basement storage room.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
